description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!
The agent that grows with you

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
IntentKit is an open-source, self-hosted cloud agent cluster that manages a collaborative team of AI agents for you.
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！

🪁 A lightweight, modern Kubernetes dashboard that unifies multi-cluster and resource management, enterprise-grade user governance (OAuth, RBAC, and audit logs), and AI agents in one workspace. Not just a tool, but more like a platform.
A Rust-native claw you can trust. One binary — sandboxed, secure, auditable. Voice, memory, MCP tools, and multi-channel access built-in.
🔬 Harness Vibe Research with Self-evolving AI Scientists
Create AI Agents in a No-Code Visual Builder or TypeScript SDK with full 2-way sync. For shipping AI assistants and multi-agent AI workflows.
Free AI Desktop Agent for Windows, macOS & Linux - Desktop Buddy, Discover Feed, Wrapped Stats, 15+ AI providers, Ollama, KoboldCpp, LM Studio. No Docker, no terminal. 🦎
Real-time web cockpit for OpenClaw: voice conversations, agent automated kanban board, workspace/file control, sub-agent sessions, inline charts, and usage visibility.
Claude Code skill ecosystem for blog content creation, optimization, and management. Dual-optimized for Google rankings and AI citations.

OpenClaw-inspired autonomous AI agent built entirely in n8n. Adaptive RAG-powered memory, Skills via MCP templates, Expert Agents with delegated sub-agents, proactive task management, media understanding - self-hosted with one setup script
